titleStmt.title: SII 5.642: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 642. (A.R. No. 82 of 1895). IN THE SAME PLACE.

summary.p: Lines 1 to 42 have been published in the South-Indian Inscriptions, Vol. III, Part II, No. 79.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṭai centāmaraikkaṇṇanāna śrīnandikeśva ranampi śrī nandikeśva rade varai
Eḻuntaruḷuvittu Ittevarkkut tiruvamutukku nāḷoṉṟukku Arici patakkum
kaṟiyamutukku nel Irunāḻiyum miḷakamutukku nel Uriyum Uppamutukku
nel Uḻakkum neyyamutukku nel Uriyum virakukku nel Irunāḻiyum Aṭai
kkāyamutukku nel Uriyum veṟṟilaikku nel Uḻakkum tiruviḷakku ney Āḻākku
kku nel Irunāḻi Uriyum tirupparicaṭṭattukku nel nāḻiyum vaṇṇattānukku
nel Āḻākkum Āka nel Aiñkuṟuṇi Aṟunāḻi muḻākku Itil Arici patakkukku
patakkeḻuvaṇṇam nel tūṇi nānāḻi muḻakku nikki nel kuṟuṇi Orunāḻi muḻakkum
kuṟukūli nel nāṭuriyum Āka nāḷ Oṉṟukku Ūrkkālāl nel tūṇip patakkāka
nāḷ munnūṟṟaṟupatukku nel nūṟṟeṇpatiṉ kalam Itukku Uṭaiyār tirumaḻu
vāṭiyuṭaiyār tevatānam kalaiyamaṅkalam kāṇiyāḷariṉṟi tevare kāṇi
yāḷarāka Ikkalaiyamaṅkavamuṭaiya pirāma
ṇan de vaṟke kāṇiyāka de var śrīpātatte nir
vāṟttuk kuṭinikki Ittevartānamākkiye tevare
Aṉupovittu vantamaiyil Ivvūril pūñceri
yeṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa tiṭal nilam Ivvūr toṟṟiṉa nāḷ mu
tal Uḻutu naṭakkaṭavataṉṟiye niṟkumel kuḻikkolāl Iraṇṭuma
ṭṭu Ucaramāy kiṭanta nilam mikutik kuṟai vuḷḷaṭaṅka veli Itil
śrīnandi keśva rade vaṟku Arccanāpokamāka śrīnandi keśva ra mayakkal Eṉṟu
tiruttina nilam Orumāvaraiyum Uṭaiyāṟ kāṭiyaruḷak kāverit tirumañcanam vai
ppār nālvaṟku nila maraimā varaikkāṇiyināl panniraṭik kolāl kuḻi Ā
yirattu Aiñnūṟṟu Orupattu Iraṇṭināl Iraṭṭi kuḻi muvāyirat tirupattu nā
lukku kuḻi Oṉṟukku Āḷ mūṉṟum kuḻi Oṉṟukku Āḷ nālum kuḻi Oṉṟukku Āḷ Ai
ñcum kuḻi Oṉṟukku Āḷ Āṟum Āka Isthā natnu śrīmāheśva rarum
karaṇattānu maṟiya niravi viḻukkāṭu kuḻi Oṉṟukku Āḷ nālāka Āḷ Oṉṟuk
ku nel kuṟiṇiyāka Āḷ pannirāyirattu toṇṇūṟṟu Āṟukku nel Āyirat
tueṇ kalamum Inta śrīnandi keśva ranampi śrīnandi keśva rade vaṟku Innilam tirit
ti Innilattukku Ūrkku muṉpu paḻaiya tiṭal varicai māttāl nel kala
māka Iṟaikku Uṭalāka niṅkum nel patin Aiñkalane kuṟiṇi nānāḻi
nikki śrīnandi keśva rade vaṟku Amutupaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭanavayiṟṟukku Aṭaippaṭi U
ṭalām nel nūṟṟu Eṇpatinkalamum tirumañcanattukku Uṭalām nel jañpa
ttu Oṉpatiṉ kalane Irutūṇip patakku nānāḻi Āka nel Irunūṟṟu Aiñpattu
Aiñkalam candrādi ttaval cellakkaṭavatākavum Innilam Uḻukuṭikaḷ cilvari pe
ruvari maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭatum ceyyakkaṭava rallātārāka Ādi caṇḍeśva
rade var Aruḷāl kalveṭṭik kuṭuttom sthā nattom Ippatikku
Ivai koyiṟkaṇakku nelkuppaiyuṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tirumaḻuvāṭip piccan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tiruvekampamuṭaiyār Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Aruṅkalamuṭaiyān tirucciṟṟampala piccan Eḻuttu Ippaṭi
kku Ivai civapākkiyatevan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kaḻumalamuṭaiyār kulantāṅkiyāna nālāyirappiccan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai poṟkoyil piccan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tillaināyakap piccaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai piḷḷaikkaṭiyān
Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai śrīkāriyam pullūruṭaiyān Eḻuttu sthā nattār Aruḷicceyya Ivveḻuttu veṭṭinen Ikkoyilil taccavācāriyan maḻuvāṭi viranāna koṭṭaiyū rācāriyanen Ivai En Eḻuttu Itu patmā heśvara ra [kṣai] .
Digital edition of SII 5.642 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
